title: Data Scientist
description: A Data Scientist in India typically spends their days collecting, analyzing, and interpreting complex data to help organizations make informed decisions. They work with various tools and technologies to extract insights from data, identify trends, and develop predictive models. Their work involves collaborating with cross-functional teams, communicating findings to stakeholders, and staying up-to-date with the latest advancements in data science and machine learning.
degree_name: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering
top_private_colleges: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology

career_progression.year_0_2: Typically starts as a Junior Data Scientist, working under the guidance of senior data scientists to develop skills and gain experience. May work on small projects, assist in data collection and analysis, and learn from senior team members.
career_progression.year_3_5: May take on more responsibility, leading small projects, and working on complex data analysis tasks. May also start to develop expertise in specific areas, such as machine learning or natural language processing.
career_progression.year_6_10: May become a senior data scientist, leading large projects, and mentoring junior team members. May also start to take on leadership roles, such as leading data science teams or working on strategic initiatives.
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: May start a data science consulting firm, offering services to clients in various industries. May also develop and sell data science products, such as predictive models or data visualization tools.
career_progression.global_pathway: May work for international companies, such as Google, Amazon, or Microsoft, or may start a career in data science in countries like the US, UK, or Australia.

india_social_context.first_year_reality: May face intense competition for jobs, and may need to work long hours to meet project deadlines. May also need to continuously update skills to keep up with the latest advancements in data science and machine learning.
common_misconceptions: Data science is only about working with numbers
Data science is a job for only those with a computer science background
